description: Portable automatic data-processing machines (laptops/tablets/notebooks)
notes: 0% MFN under WTO ITA regardless of origin; NTC Type Acceptance Certificate NOT required for laptops; 12% VAT applies on CIF value

description: Desktop computers and processing units (not portable)
notes: 0% ITA; servers workstations and desktop PCs; no NTC permit required

description: Telephones for cellular/wireless networks (smartphones and mobile phones)
notes: 0% ITA from ANY country; NTC Type Acceptance Certificate (TAC) required before BOC release; 2-6 week delay for new models; pre-register NTC before arrival

description: Base stations routers and line telecommunications equipment
notes: 0-5% MFN; ITA covers most items; NTC clearance required for radio frequency equipment; DICT clearance for some encryption devices

description: Processors and controllers (electronic integrated circuits)
notes: 0% ITA; core Philippine export sector (PEZA-registered); dominant imports from Taiwan China Japan; PEZA firms: duty-free AND VAT-exempt

description: Memories (flash DRAM storage ICs)
notes: 0% ITA; flash and DRAM memory chips; volume up 28% in 2025 PH import data; critical for electronics assembly sector

description: Printed circuit boards (PCBs)
notes: 0% ITA; bare PCBs and assembled boards; PEZA manufacturers import duty and VAT free for re-export

description: Diodes and transistors (discrete semiconductors)
notes: 0% ITA

description: Photovoltaic cells and solar panels
notes: 0-3% MFN; 0% ATIGA RCEP ITA; RA 11697 EV Industry Development Act provides additional duty incentives; solar volume up 31% in 2025 PH imports

description: Lithium-ion battery cells and packs
notes: 0-5% MFN; 0% ATIGA; imports up 28% in 2025; EV and consumer electronics demand driver

description: Static converters and inverters (grid inverters/UPS)
notes: 0-5% MFN; 0% ATIGA RCEP; solar inverters under RA 11697 may have BOI duty exemption

description: LCD/LED color televisions reception apparatus
notes: NOT ITA covered; MFN 10% from non-ASEAN non-RCEP (e.g. USA Turkey); ATIGA 0% from ASEAN; RCEP 5% from CN JP KR; Form D required for ATIGA

description: Vacuum cleaners and household appliances (power <1500W)
notes: Consumer appliances protected at 10% MFN; locally produced alternatives exist; ATIGA 0% from ASEAN members

description: Electric conductors with connectors (wiring sets/insulated cables ≤1000V)
notes: MFN 3%; ITA 0% for many sub-classifications; ATIGA 0%; widely used in electronics and automotive manufacturing

description: Parts and accessories for motor vehicles NEC (automotive electronics)
notes: 5-10% MFN for non-ITA non-ASEAN suppliers; ATIGA 0%; 5% RCEP; PH-KR FTA 0% for Korean auto parts

description: Front-end shovel loaders (construction/earthmoving machinery)
notes: 5% MFN; 0% ATIGA; BOI-registered firms may import duty-free under EO 22 capital equipment incentive; BBM infra program driving demand

description: Parts for construction mining and earthmoving machinery NEC
notes: 3% MFN; 0% ATIGA RCEP; replacement parts for earthmoving equipment; common logistics import via MICT and BCT

description: Gears gearing ball screws and gear boxes (speed changers)
notes: 3% MFN standard machinery parts rate; 0% ATIGA; industrial drivetrain components

description: Centrifugal pumps for liquids NEC
notes: 3% MFN; 0% ATIGA; used in agriculture construction and industrial processes

description: Boards panels for electric control (PLC/switchgear ≤1000V)
notes: 0% ITA; industrial PLCs and switchgear; factory automation systems; 0% ATIGA RCEP

description: T-shirts of cotton (knitted or crocheted)
notes: 10% MFN; 0% ATIGA (Form D); 5% RCEP; local garment industry protection; Ch.61 applies only to knitted/crocheted articles

description: T-shirts and singlets of other textile materials (not cotton)
notes: 10% MFN; same rate as cotton equivalent; synthetic and blended fiber garments

description: Men's trousers breeches of cotton (woven not knit)
notes: 15% MFN - highest standard textile rate; Ch.62 made-up woven articles; local industry protection highest for finished woven garments; ATIGA 0%

description: Men's suits of wool (woven)
notes: 15% MFN; premium garment category; formal suits; ATIGA 0% from ASEAN members; RCEP 5% from CN JP KR

description: Bed linen of cotton (printed woven)
notes: 10% MFN household textiles; ATIGA 0%; domestic bedding market competes with Chinese imports at 5% RCEP rate

description: Other made-up textile articles NEC (reusable bags protective gear)
notes: 3% MFN for misc made-up articles; lower rate than finished garments; ATIGA 0%

description: Pasta noodles and similar products NEC (uncooked not stuffed)
notes: 7% MFN; FDA import clearance mandatory for food products; processed food category; common logistics import via reefer containers

description: Food preparations NEC (condiments seasoning supplements health food)
notes: 7% MFN broad catch-all food preparation category; FDA clearance required; includes health supplements and functional foods

description: Coffee roasted (not decaffeinated beans or ground)
notes: 7% MFN; BPI Sanitary and Phytosanitary (SPS) clearance required; PH is net importer of roasted specialty coffee; artisan coffee import surge 2024-2025

description: Semi-milled or wholly milled rice
tariff_basis_law: RA 11203 Rice Tariffication Act / EO 105 s.2025
notes: 35% across all FTAs per RA 11203; EO 105 (2025) rice tariff adjustment mechanism by IATRC; DA monitoring; de minimis PHP 10K threshold; key food security commodity

description: Raw cane sugar (unrefined)
notes: 65% MFN - highest standard rate in PH schedule; sugar protected under CMTA; Sugar Regulatory Administration (SRA) permit required; ATIGA 5% - not zero for sensitive agricultural products

description: Frozen pork meat NEC (boneless cuts not belly)
notes: 30% MFN; BAI veterinary quarantine clearance mandatory; NMC National Meat Commission permit; local hog industry protection; African Swine Fever monitoring 2023-2025

description: Potatoes fresh or chilled (other than seed potatoes)
notes: 10% MFN; BPI SPS clearance; commodity of interest for Benguet province domestic production; imports from China and Australia

description: Acyclic saturated hydrocarbons (methane ethane propane butane)
notes: 0% MFN to encourage downstream chemical industry; DENR Environmental Compliance Certificate may be required for large volumes; LPG (propane/butane) classified here

description: Benzene (pure aromatic hydrocarbon)
notes: 0% MFN industrial chemical; DENR clearance; PDEA regulated substance (controlled precursor); import permit from PDEA required

description: Prepared chemical products and preparations NEC (blends/mixtures)
notes: 3% MFN catch-all chemical preparations; 0% ATIGA; DENR Toxic Substances and Hazardous Waste Control Act compliance may apply

description: Dioctyl orthophthalates (plasticizer DOP for PVC)
notes: 0% MFN plasticizer chemical for PVC manufacturing; used in construction packaging and automotive sectors

description: Polyethylene with specific gravity ≥0.94 (HDPE)
notes: 3% MFN; 0% ATIGA; HDPE resin for packaging manufacturing; J.G. Summit Olefins produces domestically but imports supplement demand

description: Petroleum oils crude (crude oil from natural deposits)
notes: 0% MFN - crude oil; downstream processing encouraged; DOE clearance; Oil Deregulation Law RA 8479; main import commodity for Philippine refineries

description: Light oils and preparations for petrol/gasoline (motor fuel)
tariff_basis_law: EO 20 s.2017 / CMTA / TRAIN Law RA 10963
notes: 3% customs duty; PLUS TRAIN Law excise tax PHP 9.00/L (2020 onwards); VAT 12% on total; DOE monitors strategic petroleum reserves

description: Other petroleum oils and preparations NEC (diesel marine bunker)
notes: 3% duty; TRAIN excise PHP 2.65/L diesel (2020+); marine bunker fuel key for PH port operations; DOE monitoring

description: Flat-rolled iron/non-alloy steel in coils (hot-rolled ≥600mm)
notes: 5% MFN; 0% ATIGA; 5% RCEP; infrastructure and construction demand; anti-dumping measures apply to certain Chinese steel products

description: Structures and parts of iron/steel NEC (prefabricated/structural)
notes: 7% MFN prefabricated structural steel; BBM Build Better More infra program driving 2024-2025 import volume; ATIGA 0%

description: Flat-rolled iron/steel coated with aluminium-zinc alloys (Galvalume)
notes: 5% MFN; roofing sheets and cladding panels; construction sector key end-use

description: New pneumatic tyres rubber for passenger motor cars
notes: 5% MFN; standard automotive goods rate; ATIGA 0%; imported from Japan China Thailand and Indonesia

description: Parts and accessories for motor vehicle bodies NEC
notes: 5% MFN; ATIGA 0%; 5% RCEP for CN JP KR; PH-KR FTA 0% for Korean auto parts; major imports from Japan Thailand and China

description: Motor cars with spark-ignition engine (1500-3000cc)
notes: 5% customs duty; PLUS TRAIN Law excise tax on automobiles (engine displacement-based) PHP 10K-50K range for gasoline 1500-3000cc; total cost significant

description: Crude sunflower-seed or safflower oil (edible oil)
notes: 5% MFN; FDA clearance for food-grade imports; cooking oil segment; domestic production from coconut oil (VCO) but sunflower/safflower imported

description: Crude palm oil (edible fats and oils)
notes: 5% MFN; 0% ATIGA from Malaysia/Indonesia (major producers); FDA clearance; food manufacturing input; ATIGA strategic for Philippines food processors

description: Medicaments for therapeutic use NEC (packaged for retail)
tariff_basis_law: EO 20 s.2017 / CMTA / RA 9502 Universally Accessible Cheaper Medicines
notes: 0% MFN on medicines per RA 9502 Universally Accessible Cheaper and Quality Medicines Act 2008; FDA registration and CPR (Certificate of Product Registration) mandatory

description: First-aid boxes and kits (pharmaceutical goods)
notes: 0% MFN; FDA clearance; hospital and emergency supply chain; medical supplies critical for typhoon disaster response

description: Medical electronic instruments and apparatus NEC
notes: 0% ITA and MFN; FDA Philippines market authorization (MA) mandatory; RA 9711 FDA Act governs medical devices; COVID-19 accelerated medical equipment imports 2020-2022

description: Portland cement NEC (not white cement)
notes: 5% MFN; 0% ATIGA; BBM infrastructure program driving cement imports; safeguard duties previously applied to Chinese cement imports

description: Bricks and other ceramic construction goods (siliceous fossil meals)
notes: 5% MFN; ceramic tiles and bricks; local production competes with Chinese imports; ATIGA 0%

description: Tobacco partly or wholly stemmed/stripped (flue-cured Virginia)
notes: 10% MFN; TRAIN Law excise on tobacco products separate from customs duty; Tobacco Regulatory Board oversight; Ilocos region domestic production
